headline: Revvity (RVTY) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Momentum Shift
summary: Revvity stock snapshot and recent performance Revvity (RVTY) opened the week with shares around $88.94, giving the company a market value close to $9.9b, as investors weigh its mixed short and longer term return profile. The stock shows a 1 day return of about 1.2%, with roughly 6% over the past week. That contrasts with a decline of about 3% over the past month and 13% over the past 3 months.
